title: Patio Time Bar
description: A vibrant and inviting patio bar website featuring outdoor dining experiences. Showcases menu items, ambiance, and booking options with a modern, responsive design.

title: Dealer Template
description: A professional automotive dealer website template with sleek design and inventory showcase. Features vehicle listings, search functionality, and contact forms for car dealerships.

title: Electrician Template
description: A modern electrician service website template designed for electrical contractors. Highlights services, emergency contact, and professional certifications with a clean layout.

title: HVAC Template
description: A professional HVAC service website template with modern design and responsive layout. Built for heating and cooling businesses with service details and appointment booking.

title: Plumbing Template
description: A clean and professional plumbing service website template featuring service showcases, emergency contact options, and customer testimonials for plumbing businesses.
